---
title: |
  <center>Searching lost time</center>
description: | 
  <br>
  <center>
  Remeber me
  </center>
  <br>
listing: 
  contents: 
    - "**/index.qmd"
    - "**/index.markdown"
    - "**/index.md"
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: cloud
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  fields: [title, author, categories, date, image]
  image-align: right
  page-size: 3
toc: false
format: 
  html: 
    page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false

comments: false
---
